hero-subtitle: A mythological board game where deck building and tactics intertwine
about-p1: Nausicaa is a turn-based strategic board game that brings mythological creatures to life on a dynamic 10x8 battlefield. Inspired by chess and mythological wars, players build their deck, manage their mana and strategically deploy their legendary units to defeat their opponent.
about-p2: Each game is a battle of intellect where tactics and anticipation are the keys to victory. Your goal: eliminate your opponent's Oracle while protecting your own.
step1-desc: Assemble a deck of 15 mythological units for your army.
step2-desc: Strategically place your units in your 2-row deployment zone.
step3-desc: Use your mana wisely to summon units, attack, and activate special abilities.
step4-desc: Maneuver your units to capture the opponent's Oracle and achieve victory.
board-p1: Nausicaa's battlefield is a modified 10x8 chess board where each player has a 2-row deployment zone.
board-p2: The bottom two rows (red) constitute Player 1's deployment zone, while the top two rows (blue) are reserved for Player 2.
board-p3: The board can be customized with obstacles, special terrain and magical zones to vary game strategies.
units-desc: Discover the different mythological units you can control in the game. Each unit has unique abilities and a specific mana cost.
oracle-desc: The royal unit to protect. Moves to any of the 8 surrounding squares for 1 mana (2 mana for a dash). Losing it means defeat.
goblin-desc: Basic offensive unit. Advances up to 3 squares and attacks in 4 lateral directions.
harpy-desc: Moves in 8 directions. Can trigger an explosive attack that destroys adjacent units and itself.
naiad-desc: Support unit. Draws a card when summoned and when destroyed. Cannot attack.
naiad-ability: Draws a card when summoned and destroyed.
griffin-desc: Jumps 2 squares laterally. Draws a card when jumping over a unit.
griffin-special: Draws a card when jumping over a unit.
siren-desc: Attacks simultaneously in 4 diagonal directions. Watch out for friendly fire!
centaur-desc: Can pull any unit 2 squares toward itself for 1 additional mana.
centaur-ability: Pulls a unit 2 squares for 1 mana.
archer-desc: Moves laterally and attacks up to 3 squares diagonally.
phoenix-desc: Can only move on dark squares.
phoenix-restriction: Can only act on dark squares.
shapeshifter-desc: Can swap places with any unit except the Oracle.
shapeshifter-ability: Swaps places with a unit (except Oracle).
shapeshifter-restriction: Cannot attack on the turn of teleport.
seer-desc: Generates 1 additional mana per turn but cannot move or attack.
titan-desc: Destroys surrounding units when summoned. Powerful ranged attack.
titan-attack: Powerful ranged attack with area effect.
game-mechanics-desc: Discover the mechanics that make Nausicaa unique and strategic.
mana-p1: Mana is the main resource in Nausicaa, representing the mystical energy you control.
mana-p2: Each player starts with 1 mana and gains one more each turn, up to a maximum of 6.
mana-p3: Mana is fully recovered at the start of your turn, forcing you to use this limited resource wisely to summon units, attack or use special abilities.
movement-standard-desc: Free one-square movement per turn for each unit, according to its movement pattern.
movement-dash-desc: Spend 1 mana for an additional movement, but the unit cannot attack this turn.
movement-restrictions-desc: A freshly summoned unit cannot move or attack during its arrival turn.
movement-patterns-desc: Each unit type has its own movement pattern, inspired by chess but enriched with mythological abilities.
attack-cost-desc: Each attack costs 1 mana, limiting the number of offensive actions per turn.
attack-range-desc: Each unit has its own range and attack pattern, from adjacent attack to ranged attack.
attack-area-desc: Some units like the Harpy or Titan can attack multiple squares simultaneously.
attack-friendly-desc: Beware of area attacks that can also hit your own units!
newsletter-desc: Sign up to our newsletter to receive the latest news, updates and special offers.
footer-sound-credits: Most sound effects come from Dota 2.
og-app-description: Someone has asked you to play with them.
twitter-app-description: Someone has asked you to play with them.
select-unit-details: Select a unit to see its details
objective-desc: Eliminate the enemy Oracle to win the game.
mana-rules-desc: Starts at 1, increases by 1 each turn (max 6). Used to summon units, attack, and use abilities.
action_summon: Summon: Place units in your deployment zone (2 rows).
action_move: Move: 1 square free per turn according to the unit's movement.
action_dash: Dash: 1 mana for an extra move (no attack this turn).
action_attack: Attack: 1 mana per attack, according to the unit's range.
restrictions_desc: Freshly summoned units cannot move or attack this turn.
units-rules-desc: The units each have their own particularities. You can consult them by clicking here
oracle_description: The royal unit to protect. Moves within 8 surrounding squares for 1 mana (2 mana for a dash). Losing it means defeat.
goblin_description: Basic offensive unit. Advances up to 3 squares and attacks in 4 lateral directions.
harpy_description: Moves in all directions. Explosive attack.
naiad_description: Draws a card when summoned and when destroyed.
griffin_description: Jumps 2 squares laterally and draws a card when jumping over a unit.
centaur_description: Can pull a unit 2 squares (cost: 1 mana).
archer_description: Attacks at a distance of 3 squares diagonally.
phoenix_description: Can only move on dark squares.
shapeshifter_description: Can swap places with any unit except the Oracle.
seer_description: Generates 1 additional mana per turn but cannot move or attack.
titan_description: Destroys surrounding units when summoned. Powerful ranged attack.
select_own_card: You can only select your own cards
player_one_place_oracle: Player 1 must place their Oracle first.
player_two_place_oracle: Player 2 must place their Oracle first.
act_with_moved_unit: You can only act with the unit you have already moved this turn.
select_oracle: You must select the Oracle to place it.
opponent_oracle_destroyed: The opponent's Oracle has been destroyed.
naiad_invocation_text: Naiad summoned. You draw a card!
must-host-game: You must host a game first.
share-link: Share this link to join the game:

action_summon_desc: Place units in your deployment zone (2 rows).
action_move_desc: 1 square free per turn according to the unit's movement.
action_dash_desc: 1 mana for an extra move (no attack this turn).
action_attack_desc: 1 mana per attack, according to the unit's range.
restrictions-desc: Freshly summoned units cannot move or attack this turn.
